generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "The physical building within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, specifically exemplified by a Living Lab case study, serving as the core physical counterpart for the digital twin."
    base:contains BuildingOperationalSensors, BuildingActuators, BuildingControllers
]

instance BuildingOperationalSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that collect real-time operational data from the physical building and transmit it to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingOperationalDataTransmission
]

instance BuildingOperationalDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingOperationalSensors
]

instance BuildingOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data collected from physical building sensors."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingOperationalDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto, BIMToolsEnabler, UnrealEngine5
]

instance BIMModelWithRuntimeData : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with runtime data, providing semantically rich, object-based 3D representations of geometric, spatial, and functional building characteristics for dynamic digital twin operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToolsEnabler, UnrealEngine5
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time data transmission using MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto middleware for real-time data transmission using MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for automated transformation of BIM models into deployable DT artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringPrinciples : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles for automated transformation of BIM models into deployable DT artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for continuous building operational data collection and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for modeling building behavior under various scenarios."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for energy optimization, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service for reducing building energy consumption."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort management service for optimizing lighting conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects optimization service for improving indoor environmental quality."
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectsAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service using Unreal Engine 5 for digital twin representation."
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status insight for facility management decisions."
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated scenario outcome insight for building performance evaluation."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy consumption optimization insight derived from predictive analytics."
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comfort optimization insight derived from predictive analytics."
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects optimization insight derived from predictive analytics."
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "General predictive analytics insight for building performance trends."
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insight for spatial understanding of building operations."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control action for energy optimization based on facility management decisions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control action for visual comfort optimization based on facility management decisions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control action for non-visual health effects optimization based on facility management decisions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingActuators : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) that receive control signals from the digital twin to adjust physical building operations."
]

instance BuildingControllers : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS) that receive control signals from the digital twin to adjust physical building operations."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin are sent to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware to adjust Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical and virtual components, with continuous data exchange for immediate updates and responses."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A model-driven framework integrating BIM as a semantic backbone with Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and modular service-oriented architecture for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange via MQTT protocol using Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for bidirectional communication between physical assets and the digital twin."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems such as AI, sensor networks, and BIM through standardized extension points to ensure interoperability across heterogeneous platforms."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards and implementation of standardized extension points for modular service integration to address fragmentation and lack of standardized integration mechanisms in AECO domain."
]
